official_sources.authority_note: Existing generated official answer owns the Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound keep_alive framed payload and input id.
Existing generated official answer owns the Protocol 775 Configuration serverbound keep_alive framed response payload for the same input id.

question.network_framing: With compression threshold disabled, each Conn network packet is VarInt(length of official framed payload) followed by the official framed payload.

stop_boundary: This protocol-crate socket probe proves read/map/send echo for a single official Configuration keep_alive frame; it does not prove full spawn_reader behavior, Configuration completion, Play entry, registry hydration, or initialized client loading.
